user.title: Junos NETCONF
user.description: Connect to a Junos device using read-only NETCONF over SSH. Leave host-key verification off unless Home Assistant already trusts this device's SSH host key.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Junos NETCONF service.
error.invalid_auth: The NETCONF username or password was rejected.

abort.already_configured: This Junos device is already configured.
